title: Update addressing model in spec/04-network.md and 01-architecture.md: drop ULA, promote 02xx Yggdrasil as primary global
description: Revise IPv6 addressing sections to use only link-local fe80::/10 and Yggdrasil-derived 02xx::/7 addresses. Remove all ULA references, update tables, examples, root election, IID derivation per new content in parent epic. Include address derivation diagram and scope table.
